publishedAbstract: Ceph/ODF reports HEALTH_WARN with message "OSD(s) have spurious read errors": ~~~ # ceph-s... health: HEALTH_WARN 1 OSD(s) have spurious read errors... # ceph health detail HEALTH_WARN 1 OSD(s) have spurious read errors [WRN] BLUESTORE_SPURIOUS_READ_ERRORS: 1 OSD(s) have spurious read errors osd.1 reads with retries: 1 ~~~
publishedTitle: Ceph/ODF - OSD(s) have spurious read errors
